entities.description: am16 saradc ino boot is a product that serves as a boot configuration pin  indicating its role in the startup process of a device
emmc flash is a product that is listed as the default first boot option in the startup sequence
sd  is a product that is listed as the second boot option in the startup sequence
usb    is a product that is listed as the third boot option in the startup sequence
100k    r91  is a product that is used to pull up the boot configuration pin to 1 8v power
r92  is a product that is used to pull down the boot configuration pin to ground
1 8v    is a product that serves as the voltage source for the pull up resistor in the boot configuration setup

relations.description: am16 saradc ino boot is the boot configuration pin that defaults to emmc flash as the first boot option
am16 saradc ino boot is the boot configuration pin that defaults to sd  as the second boot option
am16 saradc ino boot is the boot configuration pin that defaults to usb    as the third boot option
100k    r91  is used to pull up the am16 saradc ino boot pin to 1 8v power
r92  is used to pull down the am16 saradc ino boot pin to ground
1 8v    is the voltage source for the 100k    r91  pull up resistor
is the connection point for the    r92  pull down resistor
